MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-11-2017 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR TRIAL SETTING PREFERENCE. HEATHER HENSLEY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFFS. MICHELLE GILDEA APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT ALERT PEST CONTROL INC. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR TRIAL SETTING PREFERENCE. TRIAL DATE IS 10/30/17 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. LAST DAY PURSUANT TO CCP 36(B) IS 11/8/17. JURY FEES SHALL BE POSTED BY 4:00PM ON 7/11/17. THE LAST DAY FOR HEARING SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION MOTIONS IS 10/26/17, WITH 15 DAY NOTICE PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. TIME TO RESPOND TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY THAT HAS NOT YET BEEN SERVED IS SHORTENED TO 20 DAYS. FOR WRITTEN DISCOVERY THAT HAS ALREADY BEEN SERVED, RESPONSES ARE DUE WITHIN 20 DAYS OF THIS HEARING OR BY THE DATE DETERMINED BY THE C.C.P., WHICHEVER IS EARLIER. IF THERE IS ANY KIND OF ISSUE/DISPUTE THAT REQUIRES MEET AND CONFER, IT SHALL BE BY WAY OF IN PERSON OR TELEPHONE. THE MEET AND CONFER SHALL NOT BE MADE VIA EMAIL OR LETTER. ELECTRONIC SERVICE IS CONSIDERED THE EQUIVALENT OF PERSONAL SERVICE. FACT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS 10/16/17. EXPERT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS 10/26/17. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT IS APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
JURY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 61117936) DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT LAM, TRINH

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2018 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action Minor (Anastasia Heinmiller)
Off Calendar Feb-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Pending Action of the Minors Anastasia Heinmiller and Victoria Heinmiller.
Dept. 514. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Nichole M. Rodich, CSR #11604. Telephone: 415-551-0616.

Daniel Berko, Esq. appeared with petitioner Adrienne LaLanne, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minors Anastasia Heinmiller and Victoria Heinmiller, who were not present at this morning's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and testified.
Orders appointing Ms. LaLanne as Guardian ad Litem for the minors were filed on March 27, 2017.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petitions are granted and the compromises are approved as follows:

Anastasia Hienmiller:
Settlement Amount - $4,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - Waived.

Victoria Heinmiller:
Settlement Amount - $4,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - Waived.

The net balance of $3,000.00 for each minor shall be deposited into a blocked accounts with the San Francisco Federal Credit Union, located at 770 Golden Gate, San Francisco, CA 94102. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minors reach the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of Pending Actions of the Minors, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Accounts, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to March 20, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for Progress Report on the Status of the deposit of money into a Blocked Accounts.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Dec-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Daniel Berko, 415-771-6174 for Planitiffs/Moving parties Adrienne Lalanne, Christopher Heinmiller, Anastashia Heinmiller and Victoria Heinmiller.

Argued by counsel for Plaintiff. The named Plaintiff's are two adults Adrienne Lalanne and Christopher Heinmiller and two minor children Anastashia Heinmiller and Victoria Heinmiller. There is no Guardian Ad Litum for the two minor children and minor children can not be served. Mr. Berko requests that the Court grant the motiono as to the two adults. The Court denies the request. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF ADRIENNE LALANNE, CHRISTOPHER HEINMILLER, ANASTASIA HEINMILLER, VICTORIA HEINMILLER MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is DENIED without prejudice. Proof of Service indicates that only Adrienne Lalanne and Christopher Heinmiller were served. The only documents served on them: declaration and order. Plaintiff's counsel are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future. Judge: Newton Lam; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
